name: corivo
description: Corivo memory plugin for Codex. Save durable facts, decisions, and preferences to your local Corivo runtime.

interface.longDescription: Corivo adds durable memory to Codex through reusable skills for saving and recalling facts, decisions, preferences, and project knowledge from your local Corivo CLI runtime.
defaultPrompt: Save an important project decision to Corivo.
Query Corivo for prior preferences before answering.
Initialize Corivo in this workspace and show memory status.
